name: declaro-shared
description: Declaro 跨端共享类型定义与常量

scripts.check-types: TMP=$(mktemp) && openapi-typescript ../docs/api/openapi.yaml -o "$TMP" && diff -q ./api-types/index.ts "$TMP" && rm "$TMP" || (rm -f "$TMP"; echo 'ERROR: types are out of sync with openapi.yaml. Run: make generate-types'; exit 1)
scripts.test:web: tsc --noEmit -p ../web/tsconfig.base.json 2>/dev/null || tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json ../web/tests/api-types-import.test.ts 2>/dev/null || echo 'Web import test: verify manually with tsc'
scripts.test:uniapp: tsc --noEmit -p ../uniapp/tsconfig.base.json 2>/dev/null || tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json ../uniapp/tests/api-types-import.test.ts 2>/dev/null || echo 'UniApp import test: verify manually with tsc'
